examples: At the same time, blood vessels constrict in the nose and throat, where bacteria and viruses often lurk.
"Oxidative stress can also cause arteries to constrict by destroying nitric oxide," Prof Griffith warned.
To conserve blood that will be needed by muscles, skin vessels constrict while vessels of the muscles dilate.
And when someone is less than receptive, his or her pupils will automatically constrict.
The air passages constrict when allergens (flower pollen, for instance) or other irritants are inhaled.
